meta.about: Lightweight knowledge graph for the Backrooms game. Nodes are the things worth remembering (subsystems, concepts, decisions, conventions, mechanics, people, sources); edges are typed relations. Query it with `npm run kg -- <cmd>` (see context/kg.mjs) instead of reading the full prose docs. The graph indexes goal.md (design) and decisions.md (why) — drill into those via a node's `ref`.

relations.part_of: A is a component of B
relations.authored_by: A was written mainly by person B
relations.sources_from: asset subsystem A pulls content from source B

nodes.name: Flynn
nodes.summary: Jerry's son (14); owns game direction and authors features. Commits under Jerry's git identity — credit him explicitly.

nodes.name: Jerry
nodes.summary: Creator; sets high-level direction, reviews and merges PRs.

nodes.name: Feature-branch → PR
nodes.summary: Every change on its own branch → PR; never commit to main.

nodes.name: CC0-only assets
nodes.summary: Bundled assets must be CC0 / public-domain; verify per file (print libraries mix licenses).

nodes.name: Asset-only room props
nodes.summary: Room props come only from the model/SVG registries — no procedural box/cylinder stand-ins.

nodes.name: Procedural base, no asset files
nodes.summary: Base world (canvas textures, Web-Audio sound) is generated at runtime; the asset registries are documented exceptions.

nodes.name: Single-player now; NPCs mock multiplayer
nodes.summary: No networking yet; presence mechanics built to swap NPC → networked player with no rework.

nodes.name: Docs before PR
nodes.summary: Refresh README / decisions.md (and goal.md on direction shifts) before opening a PR.

nodes.name: Entry / orchestrator
nodes.summary: Scene, render loop, dev menu, teleports; preloads the asset registries before world generation.

nodes.name: World streaming
nodes.summary: Infinite chunk-streamed maze; layout zones; wall arrows; sparse lights. Deterministic per seed.

nodes.name: Special rooms
nodes.summary: 'Someone was here' rooms (~1 per 250m²); themed model+sign placement; ~40% get a texture skin.

nodes.name: Model registry
nodes.summary: Loads/caches glTF + STL models to cloneable templates. randomObject (research clutter) / getObject (specific).

nodes.name: SVG prop registry
nodes.summary: Parses SVG files (SVGLoader) into flat unlit meshes — wall signs mounted facing into rooms.

nodes.name: Texture-skin registry
nodes.summary: Ingests image textures as alternate wall/floor/ceiling 'skins' for leaked rooms.

nodes.name: Base materials
nodes.summary: Procedural canvas textures for the base yellow walls/carpet/ceiling; intentionally swappable.

nodes.name: Player controller
nodes.summary: First-person movement, per-axis AABB collision, sprint + stamina.

nodes.name: Cut-scene layer
nodes.summary: Found-footage opening title + in-game reveal; takes over the camera.

nodes.name: Post-processing
nodes.summary: VHS / grain / chromatic-aberration EffectComposer pass.

nodes.name: Ambience
nodes.summary: Procedural brown-noise room tone + fluorescent hum coupled to the light flicker.

nodes.name: Prop Room (dev)
nodes.summary: Dev test chamber laying out one of every registered prop; dev-menu key 5.

nodes.name: Stage 2 (dev)
nodes.summary: Separate dev room off the world grid (fixed far coordinate); dev-menu key 4.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: Central tunables: zone profiles, lights, movement, special-room params.

nodes.name: Seeded RNG
nodes.summary: Deterministic mulberry32 + hashCell; per-feature salted streams keep layouts reproducible.

nodes.name: Places
nodes.summary: Where-you-are abstraction (world / Stage 2 / Prop Room): scene, spawn, collision, streaming. Replaced the inStage2/inPropRoom flags; the seam the entity loop plugs into.

nodes.name: Entity layer
nodes.summary: Tiny entity list + per-frame update + a nearest-presence proximity signal. The seam NPCs / items / an audio entity plug into (no entities yet). Feeds the future leak + dread systems.

nodes.name: The Leak / alteration
nodes.summary: Others' influence reinterprets the base yellow into an altered Backrooms — accurate in essence but never a copy.

nodes.name: Shared lobby
nodes.summary: Persistent shared space where presences bleed in. Deferred; NPC-mocked for now.

nodes.name: Green Glow / Null Zones
nodes.summary: Green-glow unstable spots as landmarks/portals; realized as encounter-zone floor markers.

nodes.name: Still Lifes
nodes.summary: Distorted human copies — future NPC/entity visuals.

nodes.name: Layout zones
nodes.summary: Grid partitioned into open / rooms / corridor / encounter zones so space changes character as you walk.

nodes.name: Drop-a-file content pipeline
nodes.summary: The three registries share one pattern: drop an asset into public/, add a registry entry. Extensible by non-coders.

nodes.name: Sprint + stamina
nodes.summary: Hold shift to run; stamina drains, regenerates, and locks out sprint while exhausted.

nodes.name: Dev menu
nodes.summary: T opens it; 1 random room, 2 arrow, 3 reset seed, 4 Stage 2, 5 Prop Room.

nodes.name: Found-footage aesthetic
nodes.summary: REC light / VHS tracking / datestamp camcorder framing; the opening plays as a cut-scene.

nodes.name: Poly Haven
nodes.summary: CC0 models + seamless textures; pullable via api.polyhaven.com.

nodes.name: three.js examples
nodes.summary: MIT example STL models (servo housing, slotted disk).

nodes.name: Image-texture skins
nodes.summary: Textures re-skin room surfaces; third content pipeline.

nodes.name: Asset-only props + Prop Room
nodes.summary: Stripped procedural props; added the dev Prop Room.

nodes.name: SVG 2D props
nodes.summary: SVGLoader-based wall-sign registry.

nodes.name: glTF in the object registry
nodes.summary: GLTFLoader path + CC0 Poly Haven props.

nodes.name: STL asset exception
nodes.summary: External model files as a deliberate exception to procedural-only.

nodes.name: Config-driven layout zones
nodes.summary: Replaced the per-region corridor system with weighted zone profiles.

nodes.name: Direction handed to Flynn
nodes.summary: Feature roadmap cleared; goal lives in goal.md, shaped by Flynn.

nodes.name: three.js over raw WebGL
nodes.summary: Shader/post-processing-heavy roadmap; three.js gives EffectComposer + instancing.
